main.description: Marks a comment thread as resolved. Lives on the resolver's PDS, not the root commenter's or document author's — either of those two principals may write one. Presence of a record by an authorized DID means the thread is resolved; deletion reverts. Unauthorized resolution records (any DID other than the root commenter or the document author) are ignored by readers.

thread.description: Strong ref to the root dev.disnet.atrfc.comment of the thread being resolved. The 'root' is the comment in the thread with no `parent` field.

document.description: AT-URI of the dev.disnet.atrfc.document the thread belongs to. Stored alongside the thread ref so readers can list resolutions by document without first hydrating every comment.

createdAt.description: When the thread was marked resolved.
